title: GiantZombie
description: summon and battle a colossal zombie boss with customizable stats and drops!
body: Unleash a formidable foe with the GiantZombiePlugin! This plugin allows you to summon a giant zombie boss through a customizable ritual. Build the required structure, and prepare for a fight! The boss is highly configurable, allowing you to set its health, damage, speed, and the loot it drops upon defeat. This plugin is perfect for server events or for adding a new challenge for your players.
